{{Quote|Talk to D'zor out back; he may want to trade.|Barbo, to Qui-Gon Jinn|<ref name="Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)">[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]]</ref>}}
'''D'zor''' was a [[Kajain'sa'Nikto]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a resident outlaw of [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. He and his thugs camped out in the back of [[Barbo's store]], keeping a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] for protection. When the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] sought to [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] parts with [[Barbo]], the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] told him talk to D'zor. When Jinn entered the backyard, D'zor and his posse opened fire on the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who was forced to kill them in self-defense.

==Behind the scenes==
Another possible end to the situation was for Qui-Gon Jinn to jump over the city wall to the outside of Mos Espa, leaving D'zor and his thugs behind.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] {{1st}}
